options.content:
## Budget Enforcement

Real-time budget enforcement metrics from the budget limiter service. Monitor budget utilization, enforcement decisions (allowed vs denied), and track spending limits by entity (provider, organization, team).
Real-time budget enforcement metrics. Tracks actual LLM costs by provider/org/team, monitors budget utilization, and shows enforcement decisions (allowed vs denied requests).

panels.description: Actual cost charged and tracked by the budget limiter service.
panels.title: Total Cost Charged

panels.description: Requests that passed budget checks and were allowed through.
panels.title: Requests Allowed

panels.description: Requests denied due to budget exhaustion.
panels.title: Budget Denials

panels.description: In-flight requests with reserved budget awaiting completion.
panels.title: Active Reservations

panels.description: Percentage of budget consumed for each entity over time. Warning threshold at 80%, budget exhausted at 100%.
panels.title: Budget Utilization

panels.description: Remaining budget available for each entity.
panels.title: Budget Remaining

panels.description: Current budget usage in USD for each entity.
panels.title: Current Usage

panels.description: Actual cost charged by the budget limiter, broken down by model.
panels.title: Cost by Model

panels.description: Actual cost charged by the budget limiter, broken down by entity.
panels.title: Cost by Entity

panels.description: Rate of budget decisions (allowed vs denied) over time.
panels.title: Budget Decisions

panels.description: Token usage tracked by budget limiter, split by input vs output.
panels.title: Tokens by Direction

panels.description: Requests blocked by budget limiter due to budget exhaustion.
panels.title: Requests Rate Limited

options.content: Rate limit enforcement metrics showing throttled requests and current utilization.

panels.description: Failed requests (4xx/5xx) with status code and reason. DirectResponse means blocked at gateway, ResponseComplete means backend returned the error.
panels.title: Failed Requests

panels.description: Percentage of rate limit capacity currently in use.
panels.title: Rate Limit Utilization

panels.description: Breakdown of 429 responses by rate limit type. Budget = cost-based limits, Token/Request = throughput limits.
panels.title: Rate Limit Denials by Type

panels.description: Rate limit denials over time by type.
panels.title: Rate Limit Denials Over Time

panels.description: Total number of requests that fell back from an exhausted child budget to a parent budget.
panels.title: Total Fallbacks

panels.description: Rate of budget fallback events over time. Shows when child budgets are exhausted and requests fall back to parent budgets.
panels.title: Budget Fallback Events

list.description: Budget scope level: 'provider' for LLM provider budgets (e.g., OpenAI, Anthropic), 'org' for organization-level budgets (matched via jwt.claims.org), 'team' for team-level budgets (matched via jwt.claims.team). Hierarchically: team budgets are most specific, provider budgets are most general.
list.name: entity_type

list.description: Budget name identifier (e.g., 'openai' for a provider budget, 'acme-corp' for an org budget, 'ml-platform' for a team budget)
list.name: name
